languages.title: Monoko
languages.subtitle: Poná monɔkɔ oyo elobeli na monɔkɔ oyo ezali kosalelama na monɔkɔ yango.
languages.noResults: Ata minoko moko te ekokani na boluki na yo.

phone.label: Numero ya telefone
phone.searchCountry: Koluka mboka, code, to préfixe ya kobenga
phone.noCountries: Ata mboka moko te ekokani na boluki na yo.
phone.tooShort: Numero ya telephone na yo ezali mokuse mingi.
phone.tooLong: Numero ya telephone yango ezali molayi mingi.
phone.invalid: Tindá Tindá Nimero ya telefone ya ekólo oyo oponi.
phone.valid: Numero ya téléphone ya mokili mobimba

auth.onboardingTagline: Kozala moninga ya libateli na ntango oyo ezali kati na "Nazali malamu" mpe "Nazali na mposa ya lisalisi."
auth.createSubtitle: Poná elobeli ya bajɛstɛ mpo na kobatela lokasa na yo ya libateli.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Tokokaki te kokoma mokanda mobimba. Tala na kati ya mokanda na yo mpe meka lisusu.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Kosalela likita ya développement ya mboka. Native Google Sign-In azali kosala na ndako ya kotonga.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Kobakisa yango sikoyo to kobakisa yango na sima.
auth.northStarBody: Kolata ya VL01 ekoki kosala ete bato bátambola malamu na nzela ya robinet mpe bajɛstɛ ya kofina ya molai.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Moninga na yo ya boboto na karte mpe na ba appels.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ekoki kosalisa na mode ya ndako, mode Guardian, mode ya urgence, kosenga bolimbisi, mpe lisalisi ya mongongo.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Esalelamaka mpo na karte, bisika ya likama, esika ya likama mpe SOS contexte.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving asengi esika mpo ete bato oyo babatelaka bango bayeba esika nini mposa ya lisalisi ekoki kozala. Okoki kobongola yango na nsima.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Bansango esalisaka mpo na koyeba soki likama ebimi mpe soki likama ebimi.
permissions.notificationsBody: Tosalelaka kaka bansango mpo na likama ya likama mpe bansango oyo ozali na yango.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Esika ezali kobatela makambo ya libateli
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving kosalela esika na yo mpo na karte ya libateli, bisika ya likama, kokabola na lombangu, mpe makambo SOS. Okoki kobongola yango na nsima.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Ba alertes ya sécurité esengaka ba notifications
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving kotinda ba rappels ya check-in, ba mises à jour ya urgence, mpe ba rappels ya likama oyo okoki kosala. Tosalelaka ba annonces te mpo na kosala bapiblisite.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Microphone ezali kopesa nguya na ba appels ya sécurité
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving kosalela mikro na yo kaka soki obandi kosolola na moninga na yo ya AI to ya libateli.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving asalelaka Bluetooth mpo na kosangisa babiju na NorthStar, kotánga état ya connexion, mpe kosala ete biloko ya kolata ezala malamu.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving kosalela aparɛyi yango kaka soki oponi kozwa fɔtɔ ya profil to kotya fɔtɔ ya libateli.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving esalaka ete flux wana ezala na Réglages mpe na tableau de bord.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Poná mongongo ya moninga oyo omoni ete ezali malamu mpo na koyoka.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Kokengela na kimya mpo na libateli ya mokolo na mokolo.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Taps mitano ekoki komata na ba alerte ya SOS mpe ya kobatela.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Luká koyeba ntina oyo osengeli kotika likambo moko oyo esepelisaka yo te.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Sololá na moninga na yo ya motema ntango ozali na mposa ya lisalisi.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Meka komibatela na demo ya pression ya moke.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Bomba babiju pembeni na yo ntango ozali scanner.
jewelry.noDevices: Ba appareils NorthStar pene na yango emonanaki naino te.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanner ekokaki kobanda te. Nasengi yo omeka lisusu.
jewelry.scanFailed: Tomonaki babiju ya pembeni te. Tala Bluetooth, tikala NorthStar, mpe meka lisusu.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanner ekokaki kobanda te. Tala na Bluetooth na yo mpe meka lisusu.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Accès ya appareil oyo ezali pene na yango ekangami. Meká kokɔta na Linɔ́ngi Bluetooth ya Mosɛnzɛli, mpe meka lisusu.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar ezwaki ntango mingi mpo na kosolola. Pusani pene na yo, mpe meka lisusu.
jewelry.connectFailed: Tozalaki kokoka te kosolola na NorthStar. Tala soki ezali na charge mpe ezali pene na yango, mpe meka lisusu.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Ba appareils ya pembeni ezali naino te
jewelry.emptyMessage: Bomba NorthStar charge mpe pene na telefone oyo, na nsima scanner lisusu.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Na ko luka ba NorthStar oyo bazali pembeni na bango...

home.subtitle: Tableau de bord ya compagnon ya sécurité
home.readyBody: Mingongo, karte, babiju, mpe bakɛngɛli ezali eloko moko.

map.title: Carte ya sécurité
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go preview; Mapbox kotonga ndako na ndenge ya malamu.
map.updateFailed: Tokokaki te koyebisa yo esika ozali. Nasengi yo omeka lisusu.
map.notRequested: Basengaki te ete bato bázwa esika yango. Okoki kosala yango na sima na nzela ya Réglages.
map.permissionOff: Bisika ya kokɔta ezali lisusu te. Pesa yango na Réglages mpo na kotya karte ya sécurité likolo na yo.
map.timeout: Mosala na yo eumelaka mingi koleka ndenge tokanisaki. Bɛtá na esika oyo ezali na elembo ya polele mpe meka lisusu.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Bisika ya confiance oyo obombaka ekomonana awa mpo na kozwa yango na lombangu.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Na boyi ko loba na moninga na yo na mongongo na yo...

messagesWaiting.one: %{count} ya pas de message pour toi
messagesWaiting.other: %{count} ya pas de message pour moi

safetyCall.reconnect: ya pas de soucis pour la AI
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Bɛtá mesaje to mesaje ntango ozali na mposa ya kobenga.

history.clearMessage: Yango elongolaka ba messages AI compagnons na aparɛyi oyo.
history.title: Lisolo ya masolo
history.subtitle: AI ba messages oyo ebombamaki na aparɛyi oyo.
history.emptyMessage: Masolo na yo ya AI ekobima awa nsima ya bokutani na yo ya liboso.
history.loadFailed: Tokokaki te kotia lisolo ya lisolo. Nasengi yo omeka lisusu.
history.clearFailed: Tokokaki te kolimbola lisolo ya lisolo. Nasengi yo omeka lisusu.
history.deleteFailed: Tokokaki te kolongola lisolo wana. Nasengi yo omeka lisusu.

voices.title: Mingongo na ngai ya libateli
voices.subtitle: Poná mongongo ya moninga oyo okosepela koyoka.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Nasengi yo omeka lisusu kopona mongongo na yo.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Nzembo oyo ekokaki kosalema te. Nasengi yo omeka lisusu.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Salela biyano ya compagnon ya lisanga soki réseau to ba identifiants ya Hume ezali te.
settings.privacyBody: Kolongola to kolongola makambo oyo ezali na aparɛyi oyo ezali na aparɛyi oyo.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Nakoki te kobimisa ba données na yo sikoyo.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Yango elongolaka profil na yo, paramètres, contacts ya urgence, lisolo ya masolo, rappel ya ndingisa, mpe session ya auth ya esika na appareil oyo.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Nakoki te kolongola ba données locales sikoyo.

sections.languageSubtitle: Interface mpe elobeli ya ndingisa ya système
sections.companionSubtitle: Préférences ya mongongo mpe ya offline
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, bakɛngɛli, mpe bato oyo bakutanaka na bango na likama
sections.accountSubtitle: Session na yo ya VeryLoving sikoyo

settings.updateFailedMessage: Tokokaki te kobomba liponi wana. Nasengi yo omeka lisusu.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Session na yo ezali kaka na tina te. Nasengi yo omeka lisusu.

contacts.title: Contacts ya urgence
contacts.subtitle: Bato ya confiance bazali wana na ntango ya likama
contacts.name: Nkombo
contacts.empty: Ata moto moko te ya contact ya urgence ebakisami.
contacts.emptyTitle: Bato ya urgence bazali naino te
contacts.emptyMessage: Yebisá moto moko oyo otyelaka motema mpo amibongisa soki likama moko esengeli.
contacts.removeMessage: Moto yango akomonana lisusu te na esika na yo ya urgence.
contacts.nameRequired: Pesa nkombo ya moto oyo azali kosolola na ye.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Tokokaki te kotika contact wana. Tala makambo oyo ezali na ebandeli mpe meka lisusu.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Tokokaki te kolongola contact wana. Nasengi yo omeka lisusu.

device.title: Gestion ya ba appareils
device.subtitle: Salelá aparɛyi na yo NorthStar
device.none: Ba appareils ezali na boyokani te

friends.title: Baninga
friends.subtitle: Bakɛngɛli, bosengi mpe graphe ya urgence.
friends.emptyTitle: Cercle na yo ya sécurité ezali mpamba
friends.emptyMessage: Baninga mpe bato oyo batyelaka motema bakobima awa soki babakisami.

emergency.title: Urgence SOS
emergency.subtitle: Okoki kozwa lisungi kaka soki ozali na mposa ya lisungi na lombangu.
emergency.body: Yango ekosalisa yo oyeba ndenge ya komibatela mpe ekobongisa bato oyo bakutanaka na bango na mbalakaka.
emergency.notificationBody: Lisalisi na yo ya mbangu esili kobongisama.
emergency.addContact: Tindá Tindá Kosolola na bato ya urgence na bisika oyo esengeli.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Esika ya kokabola bisika esili kobongisama. Connectez le endpoint de partage backend pour envoyer des liens en direct.

quickShare.title: Kokabola na lombangu
quickShare.subtitle: Esika ya kokabola biloko esili kobongisama.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Bɛtá mbala mibale NorthStar na yo mpo na kobwaka orange ya libateli.
capybearTap.body: Nzela ya geste ebongisami mpo na makambo ya BLE

errors.voiceOffline: Ozali komonana lokola ozali na libanda ya Internet. Nsango na yo ekopesama ntango okozonga.
errors.voiceQueued: Nsango ebikisami. Ekotindama ntango moninga ya mongongo akozonga.
errors.voiceRetrying: Na meka kotindela yo lisusu message na yo...
errors.voiceConnecting: Na boyi ko loba na moninga na yo na mongongo na yo...
errors.microphone: Accès na microphone esengami mpo na ba appels vocals. Okoki kokoma yango na esika ya kokoma to kokoma yango na esika ya mesaje.
errors.billing: Moninga ya mongongo na internet azali lisusu te mpo na mwa ntango. Okoki kokoba na moninga na yo na nzela ya Internet.
errors.authentication: Moninga ya mongongo akokaki te kotala session wana. Kota lisusu to salela compagnon ya offline mpo na sikoyo.
errors.timeout: Moninga ya mongongo yango azwaki ntango mingi mpo na koyanola. Tala na kati ya mokanda na yo mpe meka lisusu.
errors.network: Tokokaki te kopusana penepene na moninga na ye. Kende na internet na yo, meka lisusu to kende lisusu na internet.
errors.genericVoice: Eloko moko ekataki mongongo yango. Komeka lisusu, to kokoba na moninga na yo ya Internet.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving azali na mposa ya microphone mpo na libateli mpe AI baninga.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving kosalela karte ya likama mpe biloko ya likama oyo ezali pene na yo.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving asalelaka Bluetooth mpo na kobenda likebi ya bato na NorthStar na yo.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Lolenge oyo ya kokɔta ezali te na ebimeli oyo.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Koba lokola ndakisa (mpo na bokeli kaka)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Lolenge ya ndakisa esalelaka kaka ba données ya lokuta oyo ezali na telefone. Misala oyo ekangami endimisami te, mpe session oyo ekozongisama na ebandeli ntango appli ekofungwama lisusu.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Code ya bondimisi ezali malamu te to esilá. Sɛngá code ya sika mpe meká lisusu.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Omeki kokɔta mbala mingi koleka. Zelá mwa moke, mpe meká lisusu.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Bondimisi ya kokɔta ezwaki ntango mingi. Talá connexion na yo mpe meká lisusu.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Tokokaki te kozwa service ya kokɔta. Talá connexion na yo mpe meká lisusu.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Session na yo esilá. Kɔtá lisusu.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Carte ya bokengi ekokaki te kofungwama. Talá connexion na yo mpe meká lisusu.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Esika ozali sikoyo ezali te. Tozali kolakisa esika na yo ya nsuka oyo ebombamaki na %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Tokokaki te kokabola esika ozali. Talá ndingisa ya esika mpe meká lisusu.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Talá esika nazalaki ntango ekomamaki na %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Talá esika na ngai ya nsuka oyo ebombamaki mpe ekomamaki na %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Ndingisa ya Bluetooth ekangami. Fungolá yango na Paramètres, mpe meká lisusu.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth ekangami. Fungolá yango, mpe meká lisusu.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Kosangisa na Bluetooth ezali te na aparɛyi to ebimeli oyo.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Tokokaki te komona NorthStar. Batelá yango pene, talá Bluetooth mpe meká lisusu.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Aparɛyi NorthStar moko te emonani pene. Batelá yango pene mpe luká lisusu.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Tokokaki te kosangana na NorthStar. Batelá yango na charge mpe pene, mpe meká lisusu.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Tokokaki te kobomba esika oyo. Meká lisusu.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Esika ya kobɛta nimero efungwami; libenga endimisami te.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Moto ya urgence azalaki te; libenga moko te esalemaki.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Esika ya kobɛta nimero ekokaki te kofungwama; libenga moko te esalemaki.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Mekano ya nsuka ya SOS ekokaki te kondimisama.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Mosungi ya mongongo azali te sikoyo. Meká lisusu na nsima to kobá na mosungi oyo asalaka kozanga connexion.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
